name: test_verify_excel_export_and_clinic_invitation
description:
Test: Export session data to Excel and send clinic invitations,
   then verify vaccination record.
Steps:
1. Schedule session, import class list, and send clinic invitations.
2. Record verbal consent and register child as attending.
3. Record vaccination for the child at the clinic.
4. Verify vaccination outcome and Excel export.
Verification:
- Vaccination outcome is recorded and session Excel export is available.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Export session data to Excel and send clinic invitations,
then verify vaccination record.
Steps:

  1. Schedule session, import class list, and send clinic invitations.
  2. Record verbal consent and register child as attending.
  3. Record vaccination for the child at the clinic.
  4. Verify vaccination outcome and Excel export.
    Verification:
  • Vaccination outcome is recorded and session Excel export is available.

setup_fixed_child = None
add_vaccine_batch = <function add_vaccine_batch.<locals>.wrapper at 0x7f16c06da980>
schools = {'HPV': [School(name='Exmouth Community College', urn='136612', site=None), School(name='St Clement Danes School', urn... [School(name='Welcombe Hills School', urn='145486', site=None), School(name='Glebe School', urn='144893', site=None)]}
page = <Page url='http://18.133.184.189:4000/patients/1003'>

children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Nathan', last_name='BLAKE', nhs_number='9086062717', address=('Flat 79', 'Ronald Knolls', '...arent(full_name='Maria Farrell', relationship=<Relationship.MUM: 'Mum'>, email_address='dixondanielle@example.com')))]}

    @pytest.mark.rav
    @pytest.mark.bug
    def test_verify_excel_export_and_clinic_invitation(
        setup_fixed_child,
        add_vaccine_batch,
        schools,
        page,
        clinics,
        children,
    ):
        """
        Test: Export session data to Excel and send clinic invitations,
           then verify vaccination record.
        Steps:
        1. Schedule session, import class list, and send clinic invitations.
        2. Record verbal consent and register child as attending.
        3. Record vaccination for the child at the clinic.
        4. Verify vaccination outcome and Excel export.
        Verification:
        - Vaccination outcome is recorded and session Excel export is available.
        """
        child = children[Programme.HPV][0]
        school = schools[Programme.HPV][0]
        batch_name = add_vaccine_batch(Vaccine.GARDASIL_9)
        generic_clinic = Clinic(name="Community clinic")
    
        schedule_community_clinic_session_if_needed(page, [Programme.HPV])
    
        SessionsOverviewPage(page).header.click_mavis_header()
        DashboardPage(page).click_children()
        ChildrenSearchPage(page).search.search_for_a_child_name(str(child))
        ChildrenSearchPage(page).search.click_child(child)
        ChildRecordPage(page).click_invite_to_community_clinic()
>       ChildRecordPage(page).click_session_for_programme(
            generic_clinic,
            Programme.HPV,
            check_date=True,
        )
